data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Microsoft.com utilizes a microservices architecture to enhance scalability and maintainability.
data.technical_spec: Distributed set of services that are independently deployable and scalable.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Employs load balancing to distribute incoming traffic evenly across servers.
data.technical_spec: Elastic Load Balancers (ELB) with auto scaling features.

data.title: Serverless Computing
data.description: Integration of serverless technologies for some backend processes.
data.technical_spec: Azure Functions and other serverless offerings.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Leverages CDN to decrease latency and increase load times for users worldwide.
data.technical_spec: Azure CDN for global content delivery.

data.title: Containerization
data.description: Adopts containerization for component isolation and efficient resource usage.
data.technical_spec: Docker and Kubernetes for container management.
